privileged_info_summary: The extract_superclass task is a Java refactoring exercise using a synthetic notification system project. The project contains two notification service classes (EmailNotificationService and SMSNotificationService) with identical fields (serviceName, enabled, maxRetries) and 7 identical methods (isEnabled, setEnabled, getServiceName, getMaxRetries, setMaxRetries, validateRecipient, createFailureResult). Both classes are located in package com.acme.notify within the Eclipse project at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/notification-system. The task requires extracting these shared members into an abstract superclass named AbstractNotificationService. However, the task description claims 20+ existing unit tests, but only 6 test methods are created in the setup.
